have you done a reaction speed test
reaction tests online can also get affected by like lag
Reaction time is my strength especially within fps games
some people just built different I guess lol
the lag varies on the device though
like my reactions are definitely better than the results I get whenever I do one
Yes the reaction time test is heavy device dependent
I wouldnt rely on that at all
I could just be bad at clicking the mouse I guess
its night and day compared to an old 60hz monitor
If your on a terrible laptop it would make that difference
273 ms for the average person according to the data collected so far
Maybe 160 if i am sleeping mid reaction test
id say 175-185 is pretty good considering im 41
But im also on a really quick pc
when i was younger i was DEFINITELY faster
Its not that fast on my shit laptop 😭
i have noticed just in playing smash with my kids that i just dont have the reaction speeds i did when i was in my early 20s
Cant wait for my reactiontime to decline
yea in shooters its night and day
i doubt its doing much for fangames with a 50fps max
I would say there is significant difference between 144 to 240 ingame but anything above that is pointless
And for fangames yeah the difference comes more from input delay
I force every game to run at 320fps
good luck with the buzz lightyear simulator
i just run 240 because its what my monitor is at
I mean I don't feel any problems with it
I tried to play fps games competatively on 60hz
When i reached a certain point
pluto must have a 6000hz monitor with how easy some things are :D
id love to know what my reaction speed was when i was 20
honestly this fight is a good example of mathematical chaos, in theory you can predict everything that happens just from where the projectiles are now, in reality good luck lol
because i used to be really quick back then
Reaction time helps but often deaths are related to shi imputs

right, so just like i said "they all sound the same" all alcohol burns the same when you drink it and you dont like the burn, good luck.

ok maybe not the alcohol shinanigans
to that end egg, theres a ton of songs that are vocaloid songs where i go.... man this song would be so much better without the shitty voicaloid

but yea your car and your computer and many alarm clocks are all digital
hope this is going better than my Iron Mario runs
but analog clocks are extremely common

i dont mean the targets, i mean the part of the drop

so for instance, you seem to consistently wait until shes closer to the top of the screen, but its ending up that shes shooting like right when you get to the spikes.... so instead of shooting her so high, if you shot her a bit lower would that change the positions of WHERE she fires things
you also have to grab an item on the right once you get to the bottom
the only thing that i was looking to avoid was to see if we could get less spawns around the "gates"
it's a weird simulation of an imperfect gas
but it sure has the vibes
well imagine the killers are air molecules
simulate millions of kotori attempts with a neural network playing to find the absolute best spot to jump
but in "perfect" air stuff doesn't bounce off each other

so the first third of the climb has a 4% clear rate, and the second section has a 2% clear rate.... its incredibly difficult
its also really interesting that they have nearly identical attempt times/counts
seconds werent important for my comparison so i left them out initially
had multiple drop 2s and multiple 1 hits
if you clear  with climb 2 your clear is invalid and you have to clear again, if you clear with climb 3 it erases your save after clear
if you clear with climb 1 the game uninstalls off your machine
Clear with climb3 for the true ending
